title: Yurei-Jima RP | Official Modpack
description: The official mod pack for Yurei-Jima RP! Designed to enhance your roleplay immersion and optimize your gameplay with a selection of lightweight mods.
body:
# Yurei-Jima RP | Official Modpack
Welcome to the **Yurei-Jima RP** official modpack! This project is meant to be used while playing our official server:
- Minecraft IP: `play.yureijimarp.com`
- Discord Server: https://discord.gg/yureijimarp

To take immersion a step further, this modpack includes a carefully selected set of mods that enhance your roleplay experience, while also optimizing your gameplay. We've outlined some of the more important mods included in this modpack down below.

## 🌿 Atmospheric Immersion
1. **Ambient Environment**: adds subtle environmental effects that make Norowarejima's weather and map feel more alive.
2. **Presence Footsteps**: implements dynamic sounds depending on what your character is stepping on.
3. **Sound Physics Remastered**: adds realistic echoes, making interiors and outdoor spaces sound more realistic.
4. **Iris Shaders**: allows the use of shaders while using this modpack.
5. **Bobby Mod**: makes it so chunks remain loaded, allowing you to see and take screenshots of the entire map.

## 🎨 Creative & QoL Tools
1. **ReplayMod**: allows you to (automatically) record your roleplay sessions in case you need to rewind and look back at past interactions.
2. **Fabrishot**: lets you take high-quality screenshots when pressing F2.
3. **Scribble**: implements tools to customize your text while writing on notebooks, even if you don't know how color codes work!
4. **Command Keys**: lets you create custom macros & keybinds for mundane and repetitive commands unrelated to roleplay.
5. **Auto-Run**: allows you to send in chats messages and commands while running.
    
## ⚙️ Performance-focused Mods 
1. **Sodium Pack**: this set of mods implements tools that'll let you customize your experience if you prefer a more performance-friendly approach.
2. **Entity Culling**: automatically unloads entities that are not in your render distance, significantly improving your FPS.

If you have any suggestions for mods you'd like to see in future versions, let us know in our [discord server](https://discord.gg/yureijimarp)!
